body:
The following supplementary pages may be issued with a return for an individual taxpayer for 2007-08 and later years

Supplementary Page 

SA102: Employment
SA102M: Ministers of Religion
SA102MP: Members of Parliament
SA102MLA: Northern Ireland Legislative Assembly
SA102MSP: Scottish Parliament
SA102WAM: National Assembly for Wales
SA103S: Self employment (Short)
SA103F: Self employment (Full)
SA103L: Lloyds Underwriter
SA104S: Partnership (Short)
SA104F: Partnership (Full)
SA105: UK and Property
SA106: Foreign
SA107: Trusts etc
SA108: Capital Gains Summary
SA109: Non-residence etc

The following supplementary pages may be issued with a return for an individual taxpayer for 2006-07 and earlier years

Supplementary Page 

SA101: Employment
SA101M: Ministers of Religion
SA101MP: Members of Parliament
SA102: Share Schemes - Issued manually, on request only
SA103: Self Employment
SA103L: Lloyds Underwriter
SA104: Partnership (Short)
SA104F: Partnership (Full)
SA105: Land and Property
SA106: Foreign
SA107: Trusts
SA108: Capital Gains - Issued manually, on request only
SA109: Non-resident
title: Returns: return issue: supplementary pages: individual profile
